title: cypripedium lichiangense subsp. lentiginosum
intro: Cypripedium lichiangense subsp. lentiginosum, also known as the Chinese lady's slipper orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to the mountainous regions of China and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating various skin conditions. In traditional Chinese medicine, Cypripedium lichiangense subsp. lentiginosum is often prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
